title: Authentic Handwritten Notebook Desk Photo AI
sourceTitle: Authentic Handwritten Notebook Desk Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Candid iPhone-style desk photo of an open notebook filled with personal handwritten notes about a messy founder idea sprint for a new AI photo app. Subject: A flat open notebook on cream dotted notebook paper with curled page corner is covered in black ballpoint handwriting, slightly messy lettering, crossed-out words, underlines, and authentic note fragments around Problem / Hook / MVP / Pricing / Risks. Scene: Simple real desk environment with coffee mug edge, AirPods case, sticky note, and capped black pen placed naturally around the notebook, creating a believable personal workspace rather than a staged stationery ad. Composition: Slightly overhead angle, notebook nearly flat and fully readable, desk edges casually cropped, handwriting dense but not perfectly aligned, with organic spacing and lived-in imperfection. Signature Elements: Preserved authentic handwritten notebook desk photo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Candid smartphone desk photography with iPhone camera aesthetic, realistic paper texture, personal note-taking authenticity, and unpolished everyday documentation. Color Palette: Cream or white paper, black ballpoint ink, warm desk neutrals, small object accents, and natural low-contrast desk tones. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: Handwritten Problem / Hook / MVP / Pricing / Risks appear as underlined section headers; the note content feels personal, varied, and messy rather than computer typeset. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
